reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los playeros!! Rapidez en el despacho de combustible. Me avisaron que se había quemado una luz y la revisaron a todas las luces y se ofrecieron a cambiarla. Excelente

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the gas station attendants! Fast fuel service. They notified me that a light had burned out, checked all the lights, and offered to replace it. Excellent!
